text:
Prediction: No

Reasoning: The current visit record primarily details severe valvular heart disease (Mitral valve stenosis and aortic valve stenosis), associated cardiac complications, and procedures related to open-heart surgery (Aortic and Mitral valve replacement, Extracorporeal circulation). There is no explicit mention of any lipid abnormality, hypercholesterolemia, hyperlipidemia, or any other condition related to lipid metabolism in the current diagnoses or procedures. Therefore, there is no strong and explicit evidence to predict a diagnosis of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" in the next hospital visit based on this record alone.
